title: Crispy Roasted Pollo Brasa
description: A fusion of Peruvian flavors with the crispiest roasted chicken you've ever had. This recipe is a must-try!

ingredients.name: a la brasa seasoning
ingredients.notes: you can find this at most Latin American markets

instructions: Rinse the chicken legs and pat them dry with paper towels.
In a large bowl, mix together the a la brasa seasoning, olive oil, and minced garlic.
Add the chicken legs to the bowl and toss to coat with the seasoning mixture.
Place the chicken legs on a baking sheet lined with aluminum foil and roast in the oven for 30 minutes.
Increase the oven temperature to broil and cook for an additional 5-7 minutes, or until the skin is crispy and golden brown.
Remove the chicken from the oven and sprinkle with chopped cilantro.
Serve hot with crispy rice, if desired.
Enjoy your delicious Crispy Roasted Pollo Brasa!
